name: code-quality-atlas
description: Marketplace for the code-quality-atlas skill suite.

plugins.name: code-quality-atlas
plugins.description: 35 code-review and maintenance skills derived from a verified code-quality research atlas: 23 diff-shaped review lenses, 8 repo-shaped audits, a decision-time lens, an artifact-conventions lens (reviews authored artifacts like SKILL.md against their own standard), a router that picks the right lenses for a change, and a synthesizer that merges their findings into one ranked verdict, with provenance, examples, and cross-model evals.
